capabilities.name: Prompt Caching
capabilities.description: Cache system prompts and large content blocks using cache_control markers. Subsequent requests pay only for cache reads (provider-reported reduced rate). Requires content block array format for system prompt.

capabilities.name: System Content Blocks
capabilities.description: Send system prompt as an array of typed content blocks instead of a plain string. Prerequisite for prompt caching and multi-part system instructions.

capabilities.name: Temperature & Top-P
capabilities.description: Control response randomness via temperature and top_p parameters on the Messages API. Supported since early 2024 but silently dropped by plugin's sanitization layer.

capabilities.name: Extended Thinking
capabilities.description: Claude models can show internal reasoning steps before producing a final answer. Improves quality on complex analysis tasks. Requires beta header and thinking parameter.

capabilities.name: Token Count API
capabilities.description: Pre-flight token counting via POST /v1/messages/count_tokens. Returns exact input token count before sending the actual request. Replaces chars/4 heuristic.

capabilities.name: Citations
capabilities.description: Claude can provide source attribution in responses, citing specific parts of the input that support each claim. Useful for evidence-based analysis in Inquiry.

capabilities.name: Batch API
capabilities.description: Submit large request batches asynchronously for provider-reported cost reduction. Results available within 24 hours. Useful for bulk analysis jobs.

capabilities.name: Streaming
capabilities.description: Server-sent events (SSE) streaming for incremental response delivery. Reduces time-to-first-token and enables progress feedback.

capabilities.name: PDF Document Input
capabilities.description: Send PDF documents directly as content blocks in messages. Claude can read and analyze PDF content without prior text extraction.

capabilities.name: Automatic Prompt Caching
capabilities.description: Automatic provider-reported discount on cached input tokens for prompts >1024 tokens with identical prefixes. Requires stable system message prefix — currently defeated by system/user concatenation.

capabilities.name: Structured Outputs
capabilities.description: Response format with json_schema type for guaranteed valid JSON matching a provided schema. Supports strict mode.

capabilities.name: Reasoning Model System Role
capabilities.description: O-series reasoning models (o1, o3, o4-mini) require special message handling — no system role for early models, but later models support developer role. Standard models support system role normally.

capabilities.name: Batch API
capabilities.description: Submit async batch requests for provider-reported cost reduction with 24-hour turnaround. Upload JSONL file of requests, poll for completion.

capabilities.name: Streaming
capabilities.description: SSE streaming for chat completions with incremental token delivery and tool call streaming support.

capabilities.name: Responses API
capabilities.description: New stateless API replacing chat completions for some use cases. Supports built-in tools (web search, code interpreter) and simpler multi-turn patterns.

capabilities.name: Context Caching
capabilities.description: Explicit cache creation for large context via cachedContents API. Minimum 60-minute TTL, minimum 32K tokens. Cached tokens billed at reduced rate.

capabilities.name: 1M+ Token Context
capabilities.description: Gemini Pro and Flash models support context windows of 1M+ tokens, enabling entire manuscript analysis in a single call.

capabilities.name: Structured Outputs
capabilities.description: JSON mode via responseMimeType and responseSchema parameters for guaranteed structured responses matching a provided schema.

capabilities.name: Streaming
capabilities.description: Streaming generation via streamGenerateContent endpoint for incremental token delivery.

capabilities.name: Search Grounding
capabilities.description: Ground model responses with Google Search results for factual accuracy. Useful for research-oriented queries but not core manuscript analysis.
